chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1573 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 13.12.2023 Mr. Abdul Naeem Pirzada, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Agha Athar Hussain Pathan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Representative of respondent No.4 (Chief Municipal Officer, Municipal Committee, Khairpur) has filed a statement and has given an original cheque No.41781641 of Rs.2,00,000/- (Rupees two lac) to the petitioner. He further submits that entire pensionary benefits would be paid to the petitioner through monthly installments of Rs.2,00,000/-. Petitioner and his Counsel are satisfied, and this petition is accordingly disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
